title: Bella's assault transport
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Bella}}
[[File:BellasAssaultTransport-LucasArts.jpg|thumb|300px|Lieutenant Bella's assault transport concepts.]]
'''Bella's assault transport''' was the personal assault transport [[Starship/Legends|ship]] of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Bella (Twi'lek)|Bella]], in operation prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Bella kept her assault transport in the hangar bay of the [[Sabaoth destroyer]] [[Reaver (Sabaoth destroyer)|''Reaver'']], as well as in the [[Nym's Base|former base]] of [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] on [[Lok/Legends|Lok]].<ref name="Jedi Starfighter">[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]</ref>

When Nym attempted to retake his homeworld of Lok from the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]], Lieutenant Bella flew her transport to the planet's surface ahead of him, lying in wait within the Federation refueling station. When Nym's assault reached the base, Bella's transport powered up from within the lower levels, and engaged the [[Feeorin/Legends|Feeorin's]] [[Havoc (starfighter)|''Havoc'']] bomber in a furious dogfight over the Lok plains, in which Nym destroyed it, killing Bella in the process.<ref name="Jedi Starfighter" />

Bella's assault transport was armed with [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and swarm missile launchers. It had a round, almost saucer-like body with four wings that rotated forwards to assist in atmospheric flight, and to the rear for boarding and disembarking. The design was similar to starship models produced by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]], though the origin of the customized vessel remained unknown. It also bore an appearance that was slightly similar to the [[Scimitar/Legends|Sith Infiltrator]].<ref name="Jedi Starfighter" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''
